_doc: Foley correctness axis registry (refine-logs/EXPERIMENT_PLAN.md Phase 0, 'Axis tiers for v1'). kind fixes the agreement metric. 'measure' names the per-axis self-target measurement implemented in foley_cw/axes.py (deterministic taggers/onset for the synthetic + real paths).

axes.name: coarse event class
axes.note: GATING metric exact_match on the confident subset (abstains excluded); Krippendorff-alpha + majority-share reported alongside, never gating — K=8 makes a 7-1 split alpha=0 exactly (frozen interpretation #5, stage_m_rerun_interpretations.md)

axes.name: material / fine class
axes.note: prime demotion risk; run only if reliability strong on all three parts

axes.name: offscreen hallucination
axes.note: analysed as seed-predictability from initial noise / very early x_s, NOT as a commitment window
